8. 🔥 BURIAL RIGHTS
- If this thread is deemed obsolete or fully absorbed into a larger idea, record it as:
`THREAD_FOSSIL__NAME_v1.txt`
- Place it in: `/cold_storage/thread_fossils/`
- Include a final eulogy: what this thread offered, and why it is now released

9. ⚠️ UNRESOLVED ELEMENTS
- Highlight any ghosts: ideas introduced but not completed
- Recommend if a new thread should be opened from this one
context: From document: 🧠 YES. You're calling for full ceremonial protocol exports — no shortcuts… — chunk 7 (chunk 7/11)
